strings.KEYWORD_SNIPERCLASSIC_ANALYZED: <style=cKeywordName>Analysatus</style><style=cSub>Velocitatis motus per <style=cIsDamage>40%</style> minuit et loricae per <style=cIsDamage>30</style> detrahit.</style>
strings.KEYWORD_SNIPERCLASSIC_MORTAR: <style=cKeywordName>Tormentum</style><style=cSub>Telum explosivum quod <style=cIsDamage>radium explosionis additum</style> cum distantia acta accipit.</style>
strings.KEYWORD_SNIPERCLASSIC_OVERCHARGE: <style=cKeywordName>Super Onus</style><style=cSub>Extra <style=cIsUtility>copias secundarias</style> tibi permitunt ut ultra onus plenum oneres pro adhuc magno damno.</style>
strings.KEYWORD_SNIPERCLASSIC_WEAKPOINT: <style=cKeywordName>Punctum Debile</style><style=cSub>Partes hostium agnoscuntur ut continentes <style=cIsDamage>Puncta Infirmia</style>. <style=cIsDamage>Punctum Infirmile</style> feriens <style=cIsDamage>50%</style> plus damni inferit.</style>
strings.SNIPERCLASSIC_BODY_LORE:
bio: sagittarius natus est cum vi speciali fortior erat quam omnes eius sodales in UES Contact Light. Milivit in exercitu Risk of Rain contra Providence pugnans et in proelio finali contra Providence pugnaverunt et Providence eum in tenebras vertit et Sagittarius versus HAN-D vertit et eum necavit prohibens eum in continuatione esse. Proprium spotter drone in proelio necavit quare hic non est quaeso desine PM mi quaerens cur id est causa. etiam pallacula sunt obscena te futue space_cowboy226 omnes sciunt te furam rubrum res furtum pedicum esse

<style=cIsHealing>placet: snipare, esse durus (modum gearbox), vectes, messors (ex deadbolt), necare, mors, dubstep, saltus retrogradi, razor chroma key, venatores calidas cum magnis mammis quae sicut meretrices vestuntur, lures, messors (e vita vera), tormenta electrica, pallacula (genus obscenum non genus effeminatum)</style>

<style=cIsHealth>displicet: spotter droes, spectrae, eliti rabidi, custos ex ues futue custos desine ostendere omnibus meos actus deviantart tu stercus mithrix, plantae mensae, space_cowboy226 (magnus podex-paedico), pluvia, vita, dux, vermes super onerantes</style>

<color=#FF0000>@risk_of_rainin_blood</color>
strings.SNIPERCLASSIC_CHARACTERUNLOCKABLE_ACHIEV: Draco Armamentum cum Scansore Radar resarci.
strings.SNIPERCLASSIC_DESCRIPTION:
Sagittarius est survivor longinqui qui cum Spottero drono operatur ut enormem damnum metis longe.<style=cSub>

< ! > Sagittari onus est post omne ictum recargandum. Tempus disco ut damnum maximum efficias!

< ! > Velocitas impetus magnitudinem fenestra recargationis perfectae Sagittarii auget et recargationis Spoteri roborat.

< ! > Exercitatio Militaris utare ab hostibus effugiendum dum Finem Firmum oneras.

< ! > Finis Firmus cum Spottero: REDITUS et perfecte recargatus Sagittarius turbas hostium delere potest!
strings.SNIPERCLASSIC_GRANDMASTERYUNLOCKABLE_ACH: Quam Sagittarius, vince ludum aut oblitera super Typhoon vel Eclipsim.\n<color=#8888>(Difficultas Typhoon Starstorm 2 requirit)</color>
strings.SNIPERCLASSIC_MASTERYUNLOCKABLE_ACHIEVEM: Quam Sagittarius, vince ludum aut oblitera super Monsoon.
strings.SNIPERCLASSIC_OUTRO_FLAVOR: ..et sic abierunt, sonus in auribus surdis adhuc resonans.
strings.SNIPERCLASSIC_PRIMARY_ALT_DESCRIPTION: Mitte tormentum <style=cIsDamage>5</style> ictuum transfixantium pro <style=cIsDamage>360% damni</style>.\nDeinde, <style=cIsDamage>recarga</style> et <style=cIsUtility>refrigerationem Spoteri tui</style> si tempore recte minue.
strings.SNIPERCLASSIC_PRIMARY_ALT2_DESCRIPTION: Mitte telum <style=cIsDamage>Tormenti</style> pro <style=cIsDamage>540% damni</style>.\nPost missum, <style=cIsDamage>recarga</style> ut damnum adhuc <style=cIsDamage>1.5x</style> accipias si tempore recte.
strings.SNIPERCLASSIC_PRIMARY_DESCRIPTION: Emitte ictum transfixientem pro <style=cIsDamage>430% damni</style>.\nPost emissum, <style=cIsDamage>recarga</style> ut damnum adhuc <style=cIsDamage>1.5x</style> accipias si tempore recte.
strings.SNIPERCLASSIC_SECONDARY_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Scopum</style> tuum activa et <style=cIsDamage>onera</style> telum tuum usque ad <style=cIsDamage>3x damnum</style>. <style=cIsDamage>Puncta Infirmia</style> intendere potest ad <style=cIsDamage>onus plenum</style>.
strings.SNIPERCLASSIC_SPECIAL_ALT_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsDamage>Stupens</style>. <style=cIsDamage>Analysa hostem</style> per 7 secundos, <style=cIsUtility>distractans</style> hostes vicinos dum <style=cIsDamage>7x100% damni</style> inferens.
strings.SNIPERCLASSIC_SPECIAL_ALT_SCEPTER_DESCRI: <style=cIsDamage>Fulgurans</style>. <style=cIsDamage>Analysa hostem</style> per 7 secundos, <style=cIsUtility>distractans</style> hostes vicinos dum <style=cIsDamage>7x200% damni</style> inferens.
strings.SNIPERCLASSIC_SPECIAL_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsDamage>Analysa hostem</style>. Percute pro <style=cIsDamage>plus quam 1000% damni</style> ut fulminet hostes vicinos pro <style=cIsDamage>50% DAMNI TOTIUS</style>. Deinde, <style=cIsHealth>Spotter tuus recare securus erit</style>.
strings.SNIPERCLASSIC_SPECIAL_SCEPTER_DESCRIPTIO: <style=cIsDamage>Analysa hostem</style>. Percute pro <style=cIsDamage>plus quam 1000% damni</style> ut fulminet hostes vicinos pro <style=cIsDamage>100% DAMNI TOTIUS</style>. Deinde, <style=cIsHealth>Spotter tuus recare securus erit</style>.
strings.SNIPERCLASSIC_UTILITY_BACKFLIP_DESCRIPTI: <style=cIsDamage>Stupens</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Saltum Retro</style> in aereum et <style=cIsDamage>recarga</style> arma tuam.
